description: Nazarin da ke bincika littattafan da aka rubuta kafin zuwan Almasihu - daga Doka da Annabawa zuwa Rubuce-rubuce. Tsohon Alkawari yana ba da labarin alkawarin Allah da Isra'ila kuma yana nuni ga Almasihu.

sections.description: Littattafai biyar na farko na Littafi Mai Tsarki (Pentateuch), waɗanda suka shafi halitta, faɗuwa, fitar da mutane daga Masar, da kuma bayar da Shari'a - tushen da sauran Littattafai ke ginawa a kai.

subsections.name: Farawa
subsections.description: Littafin Farko: Halitta, Faɗuwa, da Ubanni — Ibrahim, Ishaku, Yakubu, da Yusufu.

subsections.name: Fitowa
subsections.description: Allah ya ceci mutanensa daga bauta a Masar, ya bayyana sunansa, kuma ya ba da Dokarsa a Sinai.

subsections.name: Littafin Firistoci
subsections.description: Umarni game da bauta da tsarki, wanda ke nuna yadda mutane masu zunubi za su iya kusantar Allah mai tsarki.

subsections.name: Lambobi
subsections.description: Tafiyar Isra'ila ta jeji — gazawarta, horonta, da kuma amincin Allah na ci gaba da wanzuwa.

subsections.name: Kubawar Shari'a
subsections.description: Wa'azin bankwana na Musa, sabunta alkawari da kuma shirya Isra'ila don shiga Ƙasar Alkawari.

sections.description: Littattafan tarihi sun bi diddigin labarin Isra'ila tun daga cin nasarar Kan'ana ta hanyar sarauta, hijira, da dawowa — wanda ke nuna amincin Allah da kuma rashin amincin da mutanensa suka yi akai-akai.

subsections.name: Joshua
subsections.description: Mamaye da raba Ƙasar Alkawari a ƙarƙashin jagorancin Joshua.

subsections.name: Alƙalai
subsections.description: Zagayen tawaye, zalunci, da ceto yayin da Isra'ila ke juyawa daga Allah akai-akai.

subsections.name: Rut
subsections.description: Labarin aminci, karimci, da fansa da aka kafa a zamanin alkalai.

subsections.name: 1 Sama'ila
subsections.description: Sauyin mulki daga alƙalai zuwa sarakuna: Sama'ila, Saul, da kuma tashin Dauda.

subsections.name: 2 Sama'ila
subsections.description: Mulkin Dauda — nasarorinsa, gazawarsa, da kuma alkawarin Allah da gidansa.

subsections.name: Sarakuna 1
subsections.description: Daukakar Sulemanu da rabon masarautar; Iliya da gasar a Dutsen Karmel.

subsections.name: Sarakuna 2
subsections.description: Faduwar da faduwar masarautun biyu, wanda ya ƙare da gudun hijira.

subsections.name: 1 Tarihi
subsections.description: Sake ba da labarin tarihin Isra'ila daga Adamu zuwa Dauda, wanda ya mayar da hankali kan bauta da haikali.

subsections.name: 2 Tarihi
subsections.description: Sulemanu da haikalin, daular da aka raba, da kuma begen maidowa.

subsections.name: Ezra
subsections.description: Dawowa daga gudun hijira da sake gina haikalin ƙarƙashin jagorancin Ezra.

subsections.name: Nehemiya
subsections.description: Sake gina ganuwar Urushalima da kuma sabunta al'ummar alkawari.

subsections.name: Esther
subsections.description: Ɓoyayyen tanadin Allah yana kare mutanensa a fadar Farisa.

sections.description: Ayuba, Zabura, Karin Magana, Mai-Wa'azi, da Waƙar Waƙoƙi — littattafai da ke bincika zurfin abubuwan da ɗan adam ya fuskanta: wahala, yabo, hikima, da ƙauna.

subsections.name: Aiki
subsections.description: Bincike mai zurfi game da wahala, adalci, da kuma asirin hanyoyin Allah.

subsections.name: Zabura
subsections.description: Littafin waƙa da littafin addu'a na Isra'ila — cikakken yanayin motsin zuciyar ɗan adam da aka kawo a gaban Allah.

subsections.name: Karin Magana
subsections.description: Hikima mai amfani ga rayuwar yau da kullum, wadda aka gina ta da tsoron Ubangiji.

subsections.name: Mai-Wa'azi
subsections.description: Binciken bincike na ma'ana, aiki, da kuma mace-mace 'a ƙarƙashin rana'.

subsections.name: Waƙar Waƙoƙi
subsections.description: Bikin soyayya da aure, cike da hotunan farin ciki da bege.

sections.description: Littattafan annabci suna kira ga Isra'ila da ta tuba, suna gargaɗi game da hukunci, kuma suna nuna fansar Allah ta ƙarshe. Suna da mahimmanci don fahimtar cikar Sabon Alkawari ga waɗannan alkawuran.

subsections.name: Ishaya
subsections.description: Hukunci da bege mai ban sha'awa — gami da Waƙoƙin Bawa da ke nuni ga Almasihu.

subsections.name: Irmiya
subsections.description: Baƙin cikin annabi yayin da Urushalima ta faɗi, da kuma alƙawarin sabon alkawari.

subsections.name: Makoki
subsections.description: Baƙin ciki mai tsanani game da halakar Urushalima, wanda aka haɗa shi da bege cikin amincin Allah.

subsections.name: Ezekiyel
subsections.description: Wahayi na ɗaukakar Allah tana tashi da dawowa, da kuma alƙawarin sabuntawar ruhaniya.

subsections.name: Daniyel
subsections.description: Kasancewa cikin aminci a cikin ƙaura, da kuma wahayin mulkin Allah mai iko bisa dukkan al'ummai.

subsections.name: Yusha'u
subsections.description: Ƙaunar Allah marar ƙarewa ga mutane marasa aminci, wadda aka kwatanta ta wurin auren Hosea.

subsections.name: Joel
subsections.description: Annobar fari a matsayin kira zuwa ga tuba, da kuma alƙawarin Ruhu.

subsections.name: Amos
subsections.description: Kira mai kaifi na annabci game da adalci da kuma gargaɗin cewa addini mara komai ba zai tsaya ba.

subsections.name: Obadiya
subsections.description: Takaitaccen jawabi game da Edom da kuma zuwan ranar Ubangiji.

subsections.name: Yunusa
subsections.description: Tausayin Allah ga al'ummai - da kuma juriyar annabi mai jinkirin yin hakan.

subsections.name: Mika
subsections.description: Adalci, jinƙai, da tawali'u - da kuma alƙawarin mai mulki daga Baitalami.

subsections.name: Nahum
subsections.description: Faɗuwar Nineveh da kuma jin daɗin adalcin Allah ga mutanensa da aka zalunta.

subsections.name: Habakkuk
subsections.description: Kokawa da Allah da gaskiya game da rashin adalci, da kuma koyon amincewa da lokacinsa.

subsections.name: Zafaniya
subsections.description: Ranar Ubangiji da kuma farin cikin dawowa ga ragowar da aka tsarkake.

subsections.name: Haggai
subsections.description: Kira don sake gina haikalin da kuma fifita gidan Allah fiye da jin daɗin mutum.

subsections.name: Zakariya
subsections.description: Wahayi na maidowa da kuma Almasihu wanda ya zo cikin tawali'u a kan jaki.

subsections.name: Malachi
subsections.description: Kira na ƙarshe zuwa ga aminci kafin dogon shirun da ke gaban Yahaya Maibaftisma.

description: Nazari a cikin littattafan da aka rubuta bayan zuwan Almasihu - Linjila, wasiƙun manzanni, da Ru'ya ta Yohanna. Sabon Alkawari ya bayyana cikar alkawuran Allah a cikin Yesu da rayuwar cocin farko.

sections.description: Labarai guda huɗu game da rayuwar Yesu, mutuwarsa, da tashinsa daga matattu, da kuma labarin faɗaɗa cocin farko a faɗin duniyar Romawa.

subsections.name: Matiyu
subsections.description: Yesu a matsayin cikar Tsohon Alkawari, sabon Musa, da kuma Sarkin mulkin Allah.

subsections.name: Alamar
subsections.description: Labarin da ke da sauri game da Yesu a matsayin Bawa mai wahala kuma Ɗan Allah.

subsections.name: Luka
subsections.description: Yesu a matsayin Mai Ceton duniya — tare da kulawa ta musamman ga talakawa, mata, da kuma waɗanda ba na waje ba.

subsections.name: Yohanna
subsections.description: Mafi zurfin hoton tauhidi na Yesu — Kalmar da ta zama jiki, NI NE, Ɗan Allah.

subsections.name: Ayyukan Manzanni
subsections.description: Ruhu Mai Tsarki yana ba coci iko ta ɗauki bishara daga Urushalima zuwa iyakar duniya.

sections.description: Wasikun Bulus ga majami'u da daidaikun mutane — bincika ma'anar bishara, ɗabi'un Kirista, da kuma yanayin cocin.

subsections.name: Romawa
subsections.description: Bayanin da Bulus ya fi tsarawa game da bishara: zunubi, barata, tsarkakewa, da bege.

subsections.name: 1 Korintiyawa
subsections.description: Magance rarrabuwar kawuna da rikice-rikice a Koranti, tare da koyarwa kan ƙauna, kyautai, da tashin matattu.

subsections.name: 2 Korintiyawa
subsections.description: Karewar Bulus ga hidimarsa da kuma rashin tabbas na ƙarfi ta hanyar rauni.

subsections.name: Galatiyawa
subsections.description: Kariya mai ƙarfi ta hanyar bangaskiya kawai a kan waɗanda ke ƙara doka.

subsections.name: Afisawa
subsections.description: Arzikin asalin mai bi a cikin Almasihu, da kuma coci a matsayin sabuwar ɗan adam ta Allah.

subsections.name: Filibiyawa
subsections.description: Farin ciki a kowane yanayi da kuma misalin tawali'un Kristi.

subsections.name: Kolosiyawa
subsections.description: Kristi a matsayin wanda ya fi kowa iko a kan komai, da kuma abubuwan da ke tattare da rayuwar yau da kullum.

subsections.name: 1 Tasalonikawa
subsections.description: Ƙarfafawa ga ƙaramin coci, tare da koyarwa game da dawowar Almasihu.

subsections.name: Tasalonikawa ta 2
subsections.description: Gyaran rashin fahimta game da ƙarshen zamani, da kuma kira zuwa ga aiki mai aminci.

subsections.name: 1 Timoti
subsections.description: Umarni don rayuwar coci, jagoranci, da kuma koyarwa mai kyau.

subsections.name: 2 Timoti
subsections.description: Wasikar ƙarshe ta Bulus — umarni ga Timoti ya kiyaye bishara ya kuma gama da kyau.

subsections.name: Titus
subsections.description: Naɗa shugabanni da kuma koyar da cewa koyarwa mai kyau tana haifar da rayuwa mai kyau.

subsections.name: Filimon
subsections.description: Kira na kai tsaye don sulhu da kuma tasirin da bishara ke da shi a zamantakewa.

sections.description: Wasiƙu daga Yaƙub, Bitrus, Yohanna, Yahuda, da sauransu — sun ƙunshi bangaskiya cikin gwaje-gwaje, imani na gaske, koyarwar ƙarya, da kuma begen Ru'ya ta Yohanna.

subsections.name: Ibraniyawa
subsections.description: Yesu a matsayin cikar dukkan firistoci, hadaya, da alkawari na Tsohon Alkawari — ya fi girma ta kowace hanya.

subsections.name: Jamus
subsections.description: Bangaskiya da ke aiki — hikima mai amfani don rayuwa a matsayin mutanen Allah a duniya.

subsections.name: 1 Bitrus
subsections.description: Bege da rayuwa mai tsarki ga waɗanda aka yi hijira a cikin duniya mai ƙiyayya.

subsections.name: 2 Bitrus
subsections.description: Gargaɗi game da malaman ƙarya da kuma amincewa da alkawuran Allah.

subsections.name: 1 Yahaya
subsections.description: Tabbacin ceto da alamun bangaskiya ta gaske: ƙauna, biyayya, da gaskiya.

subsections.name: 2 Yohanna
subsections.description: Wasiƙa mai taƙaice game da ƙauna, gaskiya, da rashin maraba da waɗanda suka musanta Almasihu.

subsections.name: 3 Yohanna
subsections.description: Yabon karimci mai aminci da gargaɗi game da shugabanci na neman kai.

subsections.name: Yahuda
subsections.description: Kira mai ƙarfi don yin gwagwarmaya don bangaskiya game da koyarwar ƙarya da ta shiga cikin coci.

subsections.name: Wahayin Yahaya
subsections.description: Wahayi na nasarar ƙarshe ta Allah akan mugunta, hukuncin miyagu, da kuma sabunta komai.

description: Nazari ya mayar da hankali kan koyarwar Kirista - abin da Littafi Mai Tsarki ke koyarwa game da Allah, ɗan adam, ceto, da kuma nan gaba. Gina kanmu cikin imani mai kyau shine ginshiƙin rayuwa mai kyau.

sections.description: Nazarce-nazarcen gabatarwa da suka yi nazari kan dukkan koyarwar Kirista - bishara, manyan koyaswar, da kuma ikirari na tarihi na coci.

subsections.name: Tushe
subsections.description: Muhimman tubalan ginin imani na Kirista - abin da kowane mai bi yake buƙatar sani.

subsections.name: Linjila
subsections.description: Nazari ya mayar da hankali kan zuciyar saƙon Kirista: zunubi, alheri, da ceto ta wurin Almasihu.

subsections.name: Iƙirari da Iƙirari
subsections.description: Bayanan tarihi na imani waɗanda suka ayyana Kiristanci na gargajiya a tsawon ƙarni da yawa.

sections.description: Wanene Allah? Nazarin da ke bincika Uku-Cikin-Ɗaya, halayen Allah, da kuma abin da ake nufi da saninsa da kansa.

subsections.name: Halayen Allah
subsections.description: Tsarkin Allah, ƙaunarsa, ikon mallaka, adalci, da sauran halaye da Littafi Mai Tsarki ya bayyana.

subsections.name: Triniti
subsections.description: Allah ɗaya cikin mutum uku — Uba, Ɗa, da Ruhu Mai Tsarki — kuma dalilin da ya sa wannan yake da muhimmanci.

subsections.name: Allah Uba
subsections.description: Allah a matsayin Mahalicci, Sarki, kuma Uba - da kuma abin da ake nufi da zama ɗansa.

sections.description: Nazari kan Littafi Mai Tsarki da kansa - yadda ya kasance, abin da yake da'awa game da kansa, da kuma yadda ake karanta shi da kyau.

subsections.name: Hukuma
subsections.description: Dalilin da yasa Littafi Mai Tsarki yake da ikon yin magana a kan kowane fanni na rayuwa.

subsections.name: Wahayi
subsections.description: Yadda Allah ya yi aiki ta hanyar marubutan ɗan adam don ya ba mu Kalmarsa.

subsections.name: Canon
subsections.description: Yadda aka gane littattafan Littafi Mai Tsarki kuma aka tattara su wuri ɗaya.

subsections.name: Fassara
subsections.description: Ka'idoji don karanta Littafi Mai Tsarki da aminci da kuma daidai.

sections.description: Nazari kan abin da ake nufi da zama ɗan adam — wanda aka yi shi cikin siffar Allah, aka halicce shi, kuma aka halicce shi don wata manufa.

subsections.name: Ƙirƙira
subsections.description: Allah a matsayin Mahaliccin dukkan abubuwa - kuma menene ma'anar hakan ga yadda muke kallon duniya.

subsections.name: Siffar Allah
subsections.description: Abin da ake nufi da a yi shi cikin kamannin Allah, da kuma darajar da ke bai wa kowane mutum.

subsections.name: Kayan aiki
subsections.description: Kyakkyawan samun jiki, da kuma abin da Littafi Mai Tsarki ya ce game da wanzuwar jiki.

subsections.name: Manufa
subsections.description: Dalilin da ya sa muke nan - kiran ɗan adam na ƙaunar Allah, yi wa wasu hidima, da kuma halittar mai hidima.

sections.description: Nazari kan zunubi — asalinsa, yanayinsa, da kuma mummunan tasirinsa ga ɗan adam da duniya.

subsections.name: Yanayin Zunubi
subsections.description: Abin da zunubi a zahiri yake - ba wai kawai karya dokoki ba, amma kuma juyawar asali daga Allah.

subsections.name: Kaka
subsections.description: Abin da ya faru a cikin Farawa 3, da kuma yadda yake shafar kowane ɗan adam.

subsections.name: Jaraba
subsections.description: Yadda jaraba ke aiki, da kuma yadda masu bi za su iya tsayawa tsayin daka a kanta.

sections.description: Nazari kan halin Yesu Kiristi - cikakken Allah da kuma cikakken ɗan adam - da kuma ma'anar zuwansa.

subsections.name: Mutum na Almasihu
subsections.description: Koyarwar yanayi biyu — yadda Yesu cikakken allahntaka ne kuma cikakken ɗan adam.

subsections.name: Jiki cikin jiki
subsections.description: Dalilin da ya sa Ɗan Allah ya zama jiki, da kuma abin da ɗan'adam ɗinsa yake nufi a gare mu.

sections.description: Ta yaya Allah yake ceton masu zunubi? Nazarce-nazarce da suka shafi kafara, barata, ɗaukar ɗa, da kuma cikakken binciken abin da Allah yake yi don cetonmu.

subsections.name: Kafara
subsections.description: Yadda mutuwar Kristi ta shafi zunubi - maye gurbinsa, fansa, sulhu, da sauransu.

subsections.name: Juyawa
subsections.description: Abin da ake nufi da juyowa daga zunubi da kuma dogara ga Kristi - tuba da bangaskiya.

subsections.name: Tabbatarwa
subsections.description: A bayyana shi a matsayin mai adalci a gaban Allah — ta wurin alheri kaɗai, ta wurin bangaskiya kaɗai, cikin Almasihu kaɗai.

subsections.name: Ɗauka
subsections.description: Baiwar da ba a saba gani ba ta shiga cikin iyalin Allah a matsayin 'ya'yansa maza da mata.

sections.description: Nazari akan Ruhu Mai Tsarki - wanene shi, abin da yake yi, da kuma yadda yake aiki a cikin masu bi da kuma coci.

subsections.name: Mutum na Ruhu
subsections.description: Ruhu Mai Tsarki a matsayin mutum na uku na Triniti — ba iko ba ne, amma mutum ne.

subsections.name: 'Ya'yan Ruhu
subsections.description: Halayen hali da Ruhu ke samarwa a cikin waɗanda ke tafiya tare da shi.

subsections.name: Kyauta ta Ruhaniya
subsections.description: Baiwai da Ruhu ke bayarwa don samar da masu bi don hidima a jikin Kristi.

sections.description: Menene coci, kuma me ya sa yake da muhimmanci? Nazarin da aka yi kan yanayi, manufa, da kuma tsarin jikin Kristi.

subsections.name: Yanayin Coci
subsections.description: Abin da cocin take nufi - mutanen Allah, jikin Kristi, haikalin Ruhu.

subsections.name: Sakrament
subsections.description: Baftisma da Jibin Ubangiji — menene su, menene ma'anarsu, da kuma yadda ake kiyaye su.

subsections.name: Jagoranci
subsections.description: Tsarin Littafi Mai Tsarki na shugabancin coci: dattawa, dikonni, da kuma ikon da ke zuciyar bawa.

subsections.name: Bauta
subsections.description: Menene ibadar Kirista, dalilin da ya sa take da muhimmanci, da kuma yadda take tsara rayuwar al'umma.

sections.description: Nazari kan mutuwa, tashin matattu, hukunci, da kuma sabon halitta - begen da ke tsara yadda Kiristoci ke rayuwa a halin yanzu.

subsections.name: Dawowar Almasihu
subsections.description: Tabbataccen bege cewa Yesu zai dawo cikin ɗaukaka domin ya yi wa masu rai da matattu shari'a.

subsections.name: Hukunci
subsections.description: Hukuncin ƙarshe na Allah ga dukkan mutane - da kuma bisharar cewa Kristi ya ɗauki hukunci ga nasa.

subsections.name: Aljanna da Jahannama
subsections.description: Littafi Mai Tsarki ya bayyana madawwamin ƙaddara - da kuma dalilin da yasa suke da mahimmanci ga yadda muke rayuwa a yanzu.

description: Nazarin da ke haɗa gaskiyar Littafi Mai Tsarki da gogewar bin Kristi ta yau da kullun - a cikin dangantaka, aiki, asali, da kuma gwagwarmayar da ake ci gaba da yi da zunubi.

sections.description: Ayyukan da ke horar da mu mu kasance kusa da Allah da kuma girma cikin ibada - ba hanyoyin samun tagomashi ba, amma halaye da ke sa mu kasance a buɗe ga alherinsa.

subsections.name: Addu'a
subsections.description: Yin magana da Allah — tushensa, siffofinsa, da kuma yadda ake gina rayuwa mai wadata ta addu'a.

subsections.name: Karatun Littafi Mai Tsarki
subsections.description: Yadda ake karanta Littafi Mai Tsarki da kyau - da fahimta, daidaito, da kuma tsammanin za a canza.

subsections.name: Bauta
subsections.description: Ibada a matsayin tsari na rayuwa gaba ɗaya, ba kawai aikin Lahadi ba.

sections.description: Ci gaba da zama kamar Kristi — yaƙi da zunubi, girma cikin nagarta, da fahimtar ko wanene mu a cikinsa.

subsections.name: 'Ya'yan Ruhu
subsections.description: Soyayya, farin ciki, salama, haƙuri, kirki, nagarta, aminci, tawali'u, da kuma kame kai.

subsections.name: Cin Nasara a Zunubi
subsections.description: Taimakon aiki da na tauhidi don magance matsalolin zunubi da suka daɗe.

subsections.name: Girma a cikin Alheri
subsections.description: Abin da yake kama da girma a matsayin Kirista - da kuma abin da ke hana shi.

subsections.name: Imani a cikin Almasihu
subsections.description: Wanene mu saboda abin da Kristi ya yi - kuma dalilin da yasa hakan ke canza komai.

sections.description: Nazari kan dangantakar da Allah ya sanya mu a ciki - aure, iyali, abota, da kuma al'umma.

subsections.name: Aure
subsections.description: Alƙawarin aure — manufarsa, ƙalubalensa, da kuma hotonsa na Almasihu da coci.

subsections.name: Rashin Aure
subsections.description: Rashin aure a matsayin cikakken kira mai ma'ana, ba wurin jira na aure ba.

subsections.name: Iyaye
subsections.description: Renon yara cikin imani — da alheri, gaskiya, da kuma hangen nesa na dogon lokaci.

subsections.name: Abota
subsections.description: Kyautar abota ta Kirista - da kuma yadda ake gina dangantaka mai zurfi.

subsections.name: Sadarwa
subsections.description: Yin magana da gaskiya da kirki — da kuma sauraro da kyau.

subsections.name: Al'umma
subsections.description: Abin da ake nufi da rayuwa a matsayin jikin Kristi — ɗaukar nauyin juna.

sections.description: Nazari kan amfani da bishara ga aiki, kuɗi, lokaci, da buri — ganin aiki na yau da kullun a matsayin wani ɓangare na manufofin Allah.

subsections.name: Rayuwar Aiki
subsections.description: Abin da Littafi Mai Tsarki ya ce game da aiki — nagartarsa, takaicinsa, da fansarsa cikin Almasihu.

subsections.name: Kuɗi da Mallaka
subsections.description: Karimci, gamsuwa, da kuma ra'ayin Littafi Mai Tsarki game da wadata.

subsections.name: Gudanar da Lokaci
subsections.description: Yadda muke amfani da lokacinmu - da kuma yadda bishara ke sake tsara abubuwan da muka fi mayar da hankali a kansu.

subsections.name: Babban Buri
subsections.description: Buri mai tsarki da kuma buri mai son kai — da kuma yadda ake bambancewa.

subsections.name: Ritaya
subsections.description: Yadda rayuwa mai aminci take a lokutan ƙarshe na rayuwa.

sections.description: Yadda masu bi ke tunani da kuma aiki kan muhimman tambayoyin ɗabi'u na zamaninmu - daga adalci na zamantakewa zuwa ɗabi'un halitta zuwa fasaha.

subsections.name: Adalci na Zamantakewa
subsections.description: Zuciyar Allah ga marasa galihu da waɗanda aka zalunta, da kuma abin da hakan ke nufi a gare mu.

subsections.name: Ilimin Halittu
subsections.description: Matsalolin farko da ƙarshen rayuwa - an kusantar da su da kulawar tauhidi da tausayi.

subsections.name: Fasaha Mai Jan Hankali
subsections.description: Yadda ake amfani da fasaha da aminci a duniyar da ta siffanta ta.

sections.description: Nazarin da ke taimaka wa masu bi su shawo kan wahala, rashin tabbas, da wahala da gaskiya da bege.

subsections.name: Gwaje-gwaje da Wahala
subsections.description: Dalilin da yasa Allah ya bar wahala, da kuma yadda Littafi Mai Tsarki ya shirya mana mu jure ta da bege.

subsections.name: Fahimtar Nufin Allah
subsections.description: Yadda ake yanke shawara mai kyau - da kuma abin da Littafi Mai Tsarki ya yi alkawari game da jagora.

subsections.name: Lafiyar Kwakwalwa
subsections.description: Damuwa, damuwa, da sauran matsaloli - an yi su ne da tausayi da kulawa ta Littafi Mai Tsarki.

subsections.name: Baƙin ciki
subsections.description: Yadda ake yin baƙin ciki a matsayin waɗanda ke da bege - da gaske, ba kai kaɗai ba.

description: Nazari ga waɗanda ke da hannu wajen yi wa wasu hidima - a cikin wa'azin bishara, kula da fastoci, koyarwa, da jagoranci. Waɗannan nazarce-nazarcen sun samo asali ne daga Littafi Mai Tsarki, suna ba wa masu bi damar yin hidima yadda ya kamata da kuma dorewa.

sections.description: Tushen Littafi Mai Tsarki ga dukkan hidimar Kirista - abin da ake nufi da hidima, da kuma irin mutumin da dole ne bawa ya kasance.

subsections.name: Jagorancin Bawa
subsections.description: Jagoranci kamar yadda Yesu ya jagoranta — da tawali'u, sadaukarwa, da kuma kulawa ga waɗanda ake yi wa hidima.

subsections.name: Kira
subsections.description: Fahimtar kiranka zuwa hidima — yadda ake gane shi da kuma abin da ya ƙunsa.

sections.description: Nazari ga waɗanda aka kira su bayyana Littafi Mai Tsarki a fili - ya ƙunshi hanya, hali, da kuma nauyin sarrafa Kalmar Allah.

subsections.name: Wa'azin Bayyanawa
subsections.description: Yadda ake yin wa'azi da aminci daga rubutun — barin Littafi Mai Tsarki ya tsara ajanda.

subsections.name: Jagoran Nazarin Littafi Mai Tsarki
subsections.description: Yadda ake jagorantar ƙungiya da kyau - yin tambayoyi masu kyau da kuma taimaka wa mutane su haɗu da Allah a cikin rubutun.

sections.description: Ma'anonin aiki da na tauhidi na jagorantar coci ko hidima - hangen nesa, ƙungiyoyi, rikici, da shugabanci.

subsections.name: Hangen Nesa da Dabaru
subsections.description: Yadda ake tunani a sarari game da inda Allah yake jagoranta da kuma yadda za a isa can tare.

subsections.name: Gina Ƙungiya
subsections.description: Tattara, haɓaka, da kuma ci gaba da ƙungiyar ma'aikata mai lafiya.

subsections.name: Magance Rikici
subsections.description: Yadda za a magance rashin jituwa da rarrabuwar kawuna ta hanyar da za ta girmama Allah da kuma kiyaye haɗin kai.

subsections.name: Shugabancin Coci
subsections.description: Tsarin da hanyoyin da ke taimaka wa coci su kasance masu alhakin da kuma tsari mai kyau.

sections.description: Nazari yana ba wa masu bi damar tafiya tare da juna a cikin wahala, asara, rikici, da buƙata.

subsections.name: Tattaunawar Fastoci
subsections.description: Kwarewa da kuma yanayin da ake buƙata don tattaunawa mai amfani tsakanin mutum da mutum a hidima.

subsections.name: Shige da Fice a Rikicin
subsections.description: Yadda ake mayar da martani cikin hikima da tausayi idan wani yana cikin mawuyacin hali.

subsections.name: Ziyara
subsections.description: Hidimar kasancewa — ziyartar marasa lafiya, tsofaffi, da kuma waɗanda ba sa gida.

subsections.name: Shirye-shiryen Aure
subsections.description: Taimaka wa ma'aurata su shirya don auren da aka gina bisa ga Almasihu.

subsections.name: Kula da Makoki
subsections.description: Tafiya tare da waɗanda ke cikin baƙin ciki — abin da za a faɗa, abin da ba za a faɗa ba, da kuma yadda za a ci gaba da zama.

sections.description: Nazari kan kai bishara ga waɗanda ba su ji ta ba - da kansu, a gida, da kuma a cikin al'adu daban-daban.

subsections.name: Yin Wa'azi Kai Tsaye
subsections.description: Yadda za ka raba imaninka ta halitta da kuma a sarari a cikin tattaunawar yau da kullum.

subsections.name: Neman Afuwa
subsections.description: Amsa tambayoyin da ke hana mutane ɗaukar Kiristanci da muhimmanci.

subsections.name: Ma'aikatar Al'adu ta Ƙasashe
subsections.description: Hidima da rabawa a fadin iyakokin al'adu cikin ladabi da girmamawa.

subsections.name: Dasa Coci
subsections.description: Tauhidi da kuma aikin kafa sabbin al'ummomin bishara.

sections.description: Nazari kan hidimar taimaka wa wasu su girma — ɗaya bayan ɗaya, a ƙananan ƙungiyoyi, da kuma ta hanyar horar da tsara mai zuwa.

subsections.name: Hidima Ɗaya-da-Ɗaya
subsections.description: Ikon almajiranci da gangan — haɗuwa akai-akai don buɗe Littafi Mai Tsarki tare.

subsections.name: Ƙaramin Jagoran Rukuni
subsections.description: Yadda ake jagorantar ƙaramin rukuni wanda yake da gaskiya, girma, kuma tushen Nassosi ne.

subsections.name: Horar da Wasu
subsections.description: Samar da wasu don yin aikin hidima — ba wai kawai shugabanni ne suka ninka waɗanda suka tuba ba.

description: Nazarin da bai dace da wani rukuni ba - ko kuma bayanan shiryayyensu ba a saita su ba tukuna.
